Based on recent data, here are the top 5 prediction markets by 24-hour volume as of March 1, 2026:

| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| 1 | Khamenei out as Supreme Leader of Iran by February 28? | $62,854,217.92 | $82,787,827.89 | 0.9985 |
| 2 | Khamenei out as Supreme Leader of Iran by March 31? | $30,570,126.80 | $51,261,328.63 | 0.9985 |
| 3 | 2026 FIFA World Cup Winner | $7,806,679.07 | $228,337,208.20 | 0.1485 |
| 4 | Who will Trump nominate as Fed Chair? | $7,151,506.21 | $552,654,028.43 | 0.9315 |
| 5 | Fed decision in March? | $5,747,363.17 | $192,101,451.30 | 0.0055 |
